name: securecheck-ai-web-scanner
description: Free open-source Chrome extension for scanning AI-built and vibe-coded websites.

scripts.check: node --check background.js && node --check popup/popup.js && node --check scanner/headerScanner.js && node --check scanner/endpointScanner.js && node --check scanner/cookieScanner.js && node --check scanner/domScanner.js

author: SecureCheck contributors
